title: [codereview-pass1] coap_status.c post-cleanup
description: Chunk 1 (comments) + Chunk 2 (validation/map_count/cbor_header no truncation) + Chunk 3 (error path/ENOBUFS/SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE/format check): All non-SPDX comments removed. map_count updated with overcount checks returning 0 on >255. cbor_put_*_header now rejects >255 with overflow. format_ipv6 and snprintf return values checked for truncation setting overflow. Handlers use SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE for len==0 (ENOBUFS case). No dead code. P0: none. P1: LOG_DBG may be dead in notify if not called by coap_resource_notify - filed as bead. P2: trust_level_str not updated for UNKNOWN. P3: style in time_fields calc. All addressed in passes. Tagged codereview. West tests pending.
